question: Based on the percentages shown for each category in the chart, which category has the highest product rating share?

options.A: Other has the highest value among the categories.
options.B: Price has the highest value among the categories.
options.C: Design has the highest value among the categories.
options.D: Quality has the highest value among the categories.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
